blocked_items: End-to-end Sage re-execution of sage/r3_factorization_audit.sage (sage not present in sandbox).
claim_boundary: This is a finite-level structural/spectral/determinant fact inside the lifted-operator framework. It does not prove or imply the Collatz conjecture, global orbit behavior, determinant nonvanishing for all real s > 0, or cross-level invariance.
method: static script inspection + Python stdlib SHA-256 recomputation of every artifact, manifest, factor record, and report file; comparison against Codex-recorded hashes and the canonical patch proposal.
not_established_items: determinant positivity for all real s > 0
required_patches_to_canonical_patch_prop: Include per-model factor_degree_pattern, multiplicity_pattern, dimension, and manifest_payload_sha256.
Add a recorded_ring line naming QQ[t][y]; name y-separability ring as Frac(QQ[t])[y].
Reword 'irreducible_over_recorded_ring' as 'Sage-displayed irreducibility over the recorded ring' so it is not read as an independent algebraic irreducibility theorem.
Add an explicit reproduction caveat naming the human-side Sage re-run as the required verification step before any canonical-file insertion.
safe_claim_statement: Verified Fact, finite-level only: for r=3, the S-level unit (18x18) and full (27x27) matrices reconstructed from src/collatz_codex_harness.construct.s_counter_matrix have characteristic polynomials in y over QQ[t] that, in the Sage factorization recorded at data/generated/r3_factorization_audit/20260513T160231Z/, decompose into four displayed factors with degree pattern [1, 1, 2, 6] (unit) and [1, 1, 3, 9] (full) and multiplicity pattern [1, 1, 2, 2] (unit) and [1, 2, 2, 2] (full). The displayed product reconstructs the characteristic polynomial exactly, the total y-degree equals the matrix dimension, every artifact SHA-256 hash recorded in the bundle and reports is reproducible from the on-disk bytes (mismatches_count = 0), and the linear factor (y - row_sum(t)) corresponding to the all-equal row sum of S coincides with displayed factor 00 in both models.

sandbox_blockers.reason: sage binary not present in sandbox; reconstruction not re-executed

scope: static audit of finite-level r=3 lifted-operator S-level characteristic-polynomial factorization bundle; no Collatz-level conclusion
unsafe_claims_to_avoid: This rules out divergent Collatz orbits.
The factorization implies determinant nonvanishing for all real s > 0.
The factorization implies cross-level invariance between r=2 and r=3.
The factorization exposes a structural mechanism / Collatz dynamic.
The row-sum factor controls the spectral radius for all s > 0.
Irreducible entries constitute an independent algebraic irreducibility proof.
Exact string match against prior .sageout files is the authoritative correctness check.
r=2 mechanisms transfer to r=3 because the factorization patterns rhyme.
